markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 546. Operation of Authorized Emergency Vehicles & Certain Other Vehicles
##### § 546.0065 — Authorized Emergency Vehicles of the Texas Division of Emergency Management

The department shall designate vehicles of the Texas Division of Emergency Management that may be operated as authorized emergency vehicles.

*Added by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 17 (S.B.223), Sec. 2, eff. May 10, 2013.*

subsections.text: The department shall designate vehicles of the Texas Division of Emergency Management that may be operated as authorized emergency vehicles.

history.raw: Added by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 17 (S.B.223), Sec. 2, eff. May 10, 2013.
